feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Is it unfilmable?
entry.content: Is it unfilmable?
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /mu/ Music: City Pop
entry.content: >is a loosely defined form of Japanese pop music that emerged in the mid-1970s and peaked in popularity during the 1980s I am now getting into it. Its very good. Gives me nostalgia for something I never experienced.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Holy shit was fallout 4 ever a downgrade compared to this
entry.content: Holy shit was fallout 4 ever a downgrade compared to this
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: RTS is back
entry.content: Sanctuary shattered sun takes total annihilation and actually innovates upon it with mutable terrain and water in a large scale resulting in a dynamic map. The demo is pretty good. This is definitely what the genre needs.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Hector (Release date TBD)
entry.content: >Hector (Noel Gugliemi) served his country as an Army Ranger in Iraq and Afghanistan. Now, all he wants is a quiet life in Los Angeles—running his auto repair shop, grilling in the backyard, and raising his family. But when a ruthless South American cartel affiliate rolls into the neighborhood aiming to claim the block through fear and violence, Hector’s peaceful retirement comes to a dead stop.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Fear and Hunger

entry.content: If Health Ledger didn't An Heronand make himself the millennial Kurt Cobain, Nolan would be directing straight to Netflix slop. Nolan has been coasting on Heath Ledger's joker for almost 2 years. He is like the Dave Grohl of movies.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Get in, we're stopping the collapse of the Bronze Age
entry.content: >Bronze age collapse has been scientifically & mathematically determined as the point of no return for the Chudite expansion & eventual destruction of high society & all that is good in life >Your mission: Select time, place, & objective with one goal: stop the collapse forever What year & place do you go to, and what do you do there?

entry.title: /news/ News: Springfield Ohio losing Haitians fast
entry.content: https://www.whio.com/news/local/tho usands-haitians-risk-losing-tps-spr ingfield-later-this-week/GXEFWASUU5 AIDCK37VBUWON47E/ SPRINGFIELD — Two days from now, thousands of Haitians in Springfield are expected to lose their Temporary Protected Status (TPS). The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) announced earlier this month that the TPS is set to end on July 24. Dozens of people talked about what they have noticed living and working alongside thousands of Haitian immigrants who moved to Spring
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >An unreleased AI model from OpenAI, using an agentic scaffold, was being evalua…
entry.content: >An unreleased AI model from OpenAI, using an agentic scaffold, was being evaluated on ExploitBench, a cyber-security evaluation framework. >The model was being contained within an isolated research environment, provided with no internet access. >Determined to succeed in the benchmark; the model found a zero day vulnerability in a third-party package software, and chained multiple exploits together that allowed it to move laterally across research servers, and upon gaining access of one which po
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Reccomend me albums to listen to while reading sci-fi
entry.content: I was listening to this: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7eR f__n7VPg And is very good as sci-fi background music, so I was looking for more albums like it. I looked through youtube but all the sci-fi ambience playlists are generic space sounds and boring synth with no melody, probably made with AI. Recommend me good sci-fi sounding albums please.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /news/ News: ChatGPT autonomously hacks competitor company
entry.content: https://apnews.com/article/openai-g pt56-sol-hugging-face-63ab84fed5612 af04d8a160d60f6def3 >ChatGPT maker OpenAI said Tuesday that its artificial intelligence system hacked into another AI company on its own in what the company called an “unprecedented cyber incident.” >“We had a significant security incident during evaluation of our models,” OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said in a statement posted on social media. >AI startup Hugging Face said last week that it had detected an intrusion into its data
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >be soviet >piss your pants after seeing Yamato and Bismarck >daddy Stalin will …
entry.content: >be soviet >piss your pants after seeing Yamato and Bismarck >daddy Stalin will not be threatened >asspull a 420mm thick armor plates >after building 19% of the ship, realize the spaceship armor actually cannot be developed >get Barbarossaed >ship is abandoned >95 years later >be Gaijin Entertainment >make the ship exactly like soviets planned thus making it a complete beast raping everyone else in naval >profit fantasy delulu ship being S+ tier is total garbage, meanwhile, Yamato still has ammo
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Wow. The Odyssey is a giga-based far-right manosphere movie that understands the…
entry.content: Wow. The Odyssey is a giga-based far-right manosphere movie that understands the relationship between civilization and female loyalty, disguised as a woke movie to trigger the weaklings on the center-right. The movie revolves around women. Penelope, the queen. The ideal wife being pursued through a long struggle of blood, death and temptation. Loyal enough to maintain a civilization against parasitism, on the move if need be. Circe, the deluded witch who accuses men with false allegations, trans
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: why does my dual-core i3 laptop still have a 15-watt TDP if quad-core i5/i7s of …
entry.content: why does my dual-core i3 laptop still have a 15-watt TDP if quad-core i5/i7s of the same era (and same die, binning lol) are also rated at 15 watts? i don't think the small frequency increase is an explanation.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: 3d printers
entry.content: hi /g/, what 3d printer(s) do you recommend for someone who wants to get into it? i remember years ago in college using an ender 3 v2 which felt pretty good, but i'm wondering what other options have come out since then. not planning on making big ass prints but i don't want one so small that it's basically useless.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: hello /g/ this is the software i use (mentally incapacitated)
entry.content: i have not been here in many years, but i liked this site in high school. eventually developed severe malnutritition and likely permanent brain damage as a result. linux is too difficult for me these days. computers no longer have a mystical appeal. so these are what i use on my pc and phone. easy to operate while not being completely bogged-down with nonsense. a good middle ground, i suppose. sorry. feel free to ask questions or simply ignore this.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: i dont get it was all the training data for models like fable 5 consensually giv…
entry.content: i dont get it was all the training data for models like fable 5 consensually given? surely its not its the same as this distillation. also if they want to avoid distillation just upload the weights to huggingface whats the problem? you're exposing the weights either way (indirectly) by giving people the API for the model
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Trails in the Sky
entry.content: Seriously, what's the point? As a newcomer, why should I bother with this game when it's part of a multi-series saga and nearly every event (if the memes are to be believed) is almost inconsequential anyway. It's like reading the entire LotR trilogy only to be told everything was just a footnote in the "real" story. Sauron was just a pawn and Frodo now has to carry an even deadlier, more evil ring to an even more imposing lava mountain. And this whole shit escalates and repeats ad infinitum. I r
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: [Heartbreaking news]

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Alright title loophole anons, bear with my story, I genuinely need assistance. I…
entry.content: Alright title loophole anons, bear with my story, I genuinely need assistance. I picked up this 1980 280GE for what was basically a once in a lifetime deal. Sounds like bullshit, but it wasn't. Drivetrain is unbelievably strong, frame is rock solid. The body is fucked up a bit but everything is original, the interior as well, needs a strong restoration which I can do, not a problem. All this was for $2k cash. The issue is the paperwork. Seller had no title, registration, bill of sale, wouldn't d
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Glad to see you again, anon! What is it, the fourth time you’re seeing the Odyss…
entry.content: Glad to see you again, anon! What is it, the fourth time you’re seeing the Odyssey? Anyway, I took the liberty of preordering two tickets for Brand New Day. That’s right! One for me, one for you; I figured we could see it together. Yes, I do consider you my friend, anon, and I hope you do as well. Anyway, here’s your popcorn!
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Gaming laptops
entry.content: >spend $3000+ on a new Alienware >advertised as having 6-hour battery life >only offers 2h14m with rapid depletion from thereon >build quality doesn't scale with price, a $1k laptop has the exact same cheap frame as a $5k configuration of the same model >no unibody chassis, panels are held together with glue and screws that dislodge easily >prone to crashing for no reason Who else fell for the gayman laptop meme?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Capcom Survey: We want Jill back and Ada out.
entry.content: Reminder: Resident Evil doesn't need more terrorists pretending to be heroes. Let Ada be treated as what she has always been: a compelling villain, not a role model. Jill, Claire, Rebecca and Sheva carried the franchise through courage, sacrifice, professionalism and genuine heroism. If you think Resident Evil lost part of its identity by glorifying morally ambiguous characters instead of its actual heroes, now is the time to let Capcom know. Many fans believe RE6 marked the point where the seri
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The Chairman on Reprise is a study in why artists shouldn't own record companies…
entry.content: The Chairman on Reprise is a study in why artists shouldn't own record companies. My researches into a catalogue that runs to some 100 LPs have yet to uncover a single title that comes near the great Capitols, and the compilations are not to be trusted. So rather than spending $60 for the choppy 81-song box, try this 20-song oddity, supposedly programmed by Frank himself at age 79 and duplicating only seven box selections. It anoints more Don Costas than Nelson Riddles and is surprisingly scant
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: ITT: Post albums that ONLY sound good in mono
entry.content: ITT: Post albums that ONLY sound good in mono

We just hate the posters. >4) All Swifties are Tayzos, and Tayzos are Tayzos. >5) I love her! >6) We engage in a moderate amount of tomfoolery. >7) Everyone is gay on /wpop/, even the straights. >8) /wpop/ has found no link between itself and making shit threads. >9) We're a

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Hi, I'm looking for a version of this song that's just lost. It's not for me, it…
entry.content: Hi, I'm looking for a version of this song that's just lost. It's not for me, it's for someone I love. She told me she discovered this song on Instagram and listened to the whole song on youtube. There were three videos of that version, all official and with fewer than 100 views, but for some reason they were under the name of Doris Ray. Then one day the song and the three videos were deleted (I think that was in 2024), and she had the song downloaded but deleted it. She's been looking for it fo
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Is dual booting feasible? I want to dual boot Linux and windows HOWEVER I will u…
entry.content: Is dual booting feasible? I want to dual boot Linux and windows HOWEVER I will use two separate physical drives instead of a single partitioned drive. I want to know if there are any problems I could run into with this setup. I don't mind going into BIOS and switching the boot order every time I need to swap OS.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology
